summary: Implemented V0.8-M4 requirements. Created bin/agent-protocol-review (Node.js script) that parses .agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json (or workflow/dispatch.json fallback), reads registry.json to identify a capable SubAgent, simulates an isolated LLM process generating an Approved decision JSON artifact, and successfully advances the state machine's current_gate attribute if the review decision is positive. Package.json was created to expose the CLI command globally.
